entries.note: V57-C consumes the shipped V57-B restoration surface unchanged by default.
V57-C narrows the hardening target to the shipped observed and restored create_new exemplar only.
V57-C treats the selected exemplar as path-level evidence only and does not generalize it into class-level or restoration-family law by default.
V57-C emits one advisory-only and candidate-only hardening register without mutating live behavior by default.
V57-C derives hardening judgment from committed observation, conformance, restoration, lane-drift, and closeout artifacts before narrative interpretation.
